title: [Debian 9] building fails
body:
**Description**

After installing all dependencies, building on Debian Stretch fails. Tested with master and release v.1.7.1

**Steps to reproduce the issue:**
`make`

**Describe the results you received:**

```
$ make
go build -ldflags '-X main.GitCommit=232b46a3 -X main.buildInfo=1553208240 -X main.cniVersion=v0.7.0-alpha1'  -o buildah -tags "seccomp selinux    ostree" ./cmd/buildah
# github.com/containers/libpod/vendor/github.com/containers/2/buildah-1.7.1/cmd/buildah
cmd/buildah/bud.go:66:19: cannot use &budFlags (type *"github.com/containers/libpod/vendor/github.com/spf13/pflag".FlagSet) as type *"github.com/containers/libpod/vendor/github.com/containers/2/buildah-1.7.1/vendor/github.com/spf13/pflag".FlagSet in argument to flags.AddFlagSet
cmd/buildah/bud.go:67:19: cannot use &layerFlags (type *"github.com/containers/libpod/vendor/github.com/spf13/pflag".FlagSet) as type *"github.com/containers/libpod/vendor/github.com/containers/2/buildah-1.7.1/vendor/github.com/spf13/pflag".FlagSet in argument to flags.AddFlagSet
cmd/buildah/bud.go:68:19: cannot use &fromAndBudFlags (type *"github.com/containers/libpod/vendor/github.com/spf13/pflag".FlagSet) as type *"github.com/containers/libpod/vendor/github.com/containers/2/buildah-1.7.1/vendor/github.com/spf13/pflag".FlagSet in argument to flags.AddFlagSet
cmd/buildah/bud.go:182:54: cannot use c (type *"github.com/containers/libpod/vendor/github.com/containers/2/buildah-1.7.1/vendor/github.com/spf13/cobra".Command) as type *"github.com/containers/libpod/vendor/github.com/spf13/cobra".Command in argument to "github.com/containers/libpod/vendor/github.com/containers/buildah/pkg/parse".SystemContextFromOptions
cmd/buildah/bud.go:187:41: cannot use c (type *"github.com/containers/libpod/vendor/github.com/containers/2/buildah-1.7.1/vendor/github.com/spf13/cobra".Command) as type *"github.com/containers/libpod/vendor/github.com/spf13/cobra".Command in argument to "github.com/containers/libpod/vendor/github.com/containers/buildah/pkg/parse".IsolationOption
cmd/buildah/bud.go:197:45: cannot use c (type *"github.com/containers/libpod/vendor/github.com/containers/2/buildah-1.7.1/vendor/github.com/spf13/cobra".Command) as type *"github.com/containers/libpod/vendor/github.com/spf13/cobra".Command in argument to "github.com/containers/libpod/vendor/github.com/containers/buildah/pkg/parse".CommonBuildOptions
cmd/buildah/bud.go:227:64: cannot use c (type *"github.com/containers/libpod/vendor/github.com/containers/2/buildah-1.7.1/vendor/github.com/spf13/cobra".Command) as type *"github.com/containers/libpod/vendor/github.com/spf13/cobra".Command in argument to "github.com/containers/libpod/vendor/github.com/containers/buildah/pkg/parse".NamespaceOptions
cmd/buildah/bud.go:231:63: not enough arguments in call to "github.com/containers/libpod/vendor/github.com/containers/buildah/pkg/parse".IDMappingOptions
        have (*"github.com/containers/libpod/vendor/github.com/containers/2/buildah-1.7.1/vendor/github.com/spf13/cobra".Command)
        want (*"github.com/containers/libpod/vendor/github.com/spf13/cobra".Command, buildah.Isolation)
cmd/buildah/bud.go:281:54: cannot use store (type "github.com/containers/libpod/vendor/github.com/containers/2/buildah-1.7.1/vendor/github.com/containers/storage".Store) as type "github.com/containers/libpod/vendor/github.com/containers/storage".Store in argument to imagebuildah.BuildDockerfiles:
        "github.com/containers/libpod/vendor/github.com/containers/2/buildah-1.7.1/vendor/github.com/containers/storage".Store does not implement "github.com/containers/libpod/vendor/github.com/containers/storage".Store (wrong type for Changes method)
                have Changes(string, string) ([]"github.com/containers/libpod/vendor/github.com/containers/2/buildah-1.7.1/vendor/github.com/containers/storage/pkg/archive".Change, error)
                want Changes(string, string) ([]"github.com/containers/libpod/vendor/github.com/containers/storage/pkg/archive".Change, error)
cmd/buildah/commit.go:127:54: cannot use c (type *"github.com/containers/libpod/vendor/github.com/containers/2/buildah-1.7.1/vendor/github.com/spf13/cobra".Command) as type *"github.com/containers/libpod/vendor/github.com/spf13/cobra".Command in argument to "github.com/containers/libpod/vendor/github.com/containers/buildah/pkg/parse".SystemContextFromOptions
cmd/buildah/commit.go:127:54: too many errors
Makefile:34: recipe for target 'binary' failed
make: *** [binary] Error 2
```
**Output of `cat /etc/*release`:**

```
PRETTY_NAME="Debian GNU/Linux 9 (stretch)"
NAME="Debian GNU/Linux"
VERSION_ID="9"
VERSION="9 (stretch)"
ID=debian
HOME_URL="https://www.debian.org/"
SUPPORT_URL="https://www.debian.org/support"
BUG_REPORT_URL="https://bugs.debian.org/"
```

**Output of `uname -a`:**

```
4.19.0-0.bpo.2-amd64
```

**Additional information**

_Podman_ works like a charm here.

comments.body:
I've fixed it the hard way:

```
export GOPATH=/home/podman/go
rm -rf "$GOPATH/*"
go get github.com/containers/buildah
```

And now it works.
